sourceMovie.title: The First Purge
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The First Purge (2018) stuck because it commits to its action premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Gerard McMurray's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The action and horror blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Purge: Election Year
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The First Purge clicked for you, The Purge: Election Year (2016) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and horror, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The First Purge?
faq.answer: Try The Purge: Election Year, The Hunt, The Forever Purge—each shares DNA with The First Purge while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The First Purge?
faq.answer: The First Purge (2018) is best described as Action, Horror, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The First Purge part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "The Purge Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
